plist.dict:
Label {{label}} UserName agent-lab ProgramArguments
{{repo_root}}/automations/bin/run-automation {{name}}
WorkingDirectory {{repo_root}} EnvironmentVariables
HOME /Users/agent-lab PATH /opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin
{{schedule}} StandardOutPath {{repo_root}}/logs/{{log_name}}.log StandardErrorPath {{repo_root}}/logs/{{log_name}}.log RunAtLoad <{{run_at_load}}/>
